member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreaker
member.summary: Encapsulates Polly's ResiliencePipeline to implement the Circuit Breaker pattern.

member.name: M:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreaker.UpdateState(CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitState)
member.summary: Updates the circuit state. Called internally by event callbacks.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerFactory
member.summary: Factory class to construct instances of powered by Polly's advanced circuit breaker.

member.name: M:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerFactory.Create(CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new configured with the specified options.
member.param: A friendly name for the protected resource (exposed via ).

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the Polly-backed Advanced Circuit Breaker.

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions.FailureRatio
member.summary: The failure ratio (percentage between 0.0 and 1.0) of executions that must fail to trip the circuit. Default is 0.5 (50% failure rate).

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions.SamplingDuration
member.summary: The sliding sampling window duration during which the failure ratio is monitored. Default is 10 seconds.

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions.MinimumThroughput
member.summary: The minimum volume of calls that must pass through in the sampling window before the circuit breaker can trip. Default is 8 calls. Must be at least 2 (Polly requirement).

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions.BreakDuration
member.summary: The duration the circuit remains open before transitioning to Half-Open to test the service. Default is 5 seconds.

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions.OnOpened
member.summary: Optional callback invoked when the circuit transitions to . Receives the break duration as a parameter.

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions.OnClosed
member.summary: Optional callback invoked when the circuit transitions to .

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitBreakerOptions.OnHalfOpened
member.summary: Optional callback invoked when the circuit transitions to .

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitState
member.summary: Represents the current state of the circuit breaker.

member.name: F:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitState.Closed
member.summary: The circuit is closed. Requests flow normally.

member.name: F:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitState.Open
member.summary: The circuit is open. All requests are blocked.

member.name: F:CircuitBreaker.Core.CircuitState.HalfOpen
member.summary: The circuit is half-open. A single test request is allowed through.

member.name: T:CircuitBreaker.Core.ICircuitBreaker
member.summary: Defines a generic, simplified interface to execute operations protected by a Circuit Breaker.

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.ICircuitBreaker.State
member.summary: Gets the current state of the circuit breaker.

member.name: P:CircuitBreaker.Core.ICircuitBreaker.ResourceName
member.summary: Gets the friendly name of the protected resource supplied at creation time.

member.name: M:CircuitBreaker.Core.ICircuitBreaker.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Executes an asynchronous operation that returns a result through the circuit breaker.
member.exception: Thrown when the circuit is open.

member.name: M:CircuitBreaker.Core.ICircuitBreaker.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an asynchronous operation that returns a result through the circuit breaker, propagating the cancellation token provided by the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The asynchronous operation to execute, receiving a .
member.exception: Thrown when the circuit is open.

member.name: M:CircuitBreaker.Core.ICircuitBreaker.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Executes an asynchronous operation that does not return a result through the circuit breaker.
member.exception: Thrown when the circuit is open.

member.name: M:CircuitBreaker.Core.ICircuitBreaker.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an asynchronous operation that does not return a result through the circuit breaker, propagating the cancellation token provided by the resilience pipeline.
member.param: The asynchronous operation to execute, receiving a .
member.exception: Thrown when the circuit is open.
